_description: Master list of all avatars for this brand. Tracks status, persona match, and performance notes

avatars.name: Bea
avatars.status: ACTIVE — casting complete, pending reference lock

avatars.name: Tara
avatars.primary_signature: Deep-set under-eye hollows with visible purple-blue veins

avatars.name: Beth
avatars.primary_signature: Prominent beauty mark on right cheek + tooth gap

avatars.name: Emma
avatars.primary_signature: Dense freckle band across nose bridge and cheeks

strategy_notes.why_multiple: Different avatars let us A/B test which face performs best with the audience. Also lets us target different demographics within the same brand without changing the product or messaging — just the avatar
strategy_notes.recommended_testing: Start with Bea (broadest appeal). If ads perform, duplicate winning scripts with Tara/Beth/Emma to test demographic response. Compare CTR and CPA across avatars
strategy_notes.max_active: No more than 3 active avatars per brand at any time. More than that = split focus
